title: rubus wartmannii
intro: Rubus wartmannii, also known as the Wartmann's raspberry or Wartmann's bramble, is a species of raspberry native to Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus wartmannii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Rubus wartmannii is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
